calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-24-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Petitioner: Melat Konjit Bekele, the mother, present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the
Minor: Konjit Bekele, was sworn and examined.
Order dispensing notice to the father filed on April 19, 2005.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Eden Mona Lisa Bekele.
Decree signed in open court.
